spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the Structured Field list format of the Speculation-Rules header pointing to a JSON rule document.

interactive.rationale: Editable JSON drives live header + response example generation.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises canonical header generation from edited JSON; delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't cover SFV quoting edge cases (URLs with special chars), multiple rule docs (comma-separated list), or what happens with malformed JSON.

references.rationale: See also has no chromestatus.com link. Rule #3 regression.

openQuestions.title: Cover multi-rule-doc header values
openQuestions.detail: The Structured Field list permits multiple URLs. Add a preset that sets two rule documents and shows the comma-separated header value with proper SFV quoting.

summary: Hands-on header generator with editable JSON. Missing the chromestatus reference link and only handles the single-rule-doc case.
